latest_articles.title: Rare footage captured of Great White shark in Mediterranean Sea
latest_articles.summary: A volunteer diver has described shaking as he filmed his encounter with an endangered Great White shark between Tunisia and Sicily.
latest_articles.evidence: Great White shark in Mediterranean Sea between Tunisia and Sicily
